1790790.name: Rogue State Revolution Soundtrack
1790790.description:
Artist & Composer: Denis Comtesse
Lyrics by Ryan Hewer
Bonus Track "Alternative Anthem" by Greg Emond
Choir on "Bring Us The King":
Alex Banfield, Neil Balfour, Wallis Giunta, Natalie Sinnott, John Savournin, Krystal Macmillan

Track 1: Bring Us the King (1:56)
Track 2: The City of Majimarah (3:14)
Track 3: Prelude to an Invasion (1:26)
Track 4: Deserts of Rumai (2:46)
Track 5: A Mood of Jubilation (1:17)
Track 6: Rebuilding the Country (3:05)
Track 7: Oryx (3:45)
Track 8: Election Time (1:38)
Track 9: That Ended Badly (1:46)
Track 10: Bring Us the King (Instrumental) (1:45)
Track 11: Alternative Anthem (by Greg Emond) (4:18)
